hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.ebnf) printf "%s\n" "PGEN EBNF GUARDRAIL — before changing any return annotation in a .ebnf grammar, consult: grammars/return_annotation.ebnf (\$N | \$N::M[*] | single-star \$N* | flat-spread \$N**), docs/RETURN_ANNOTATIONS_REFERENCE.md, docs/reference/PGEN_ANNOTATION_NORMATIVE_SPEC.md, and memory feedback_quantified_group_extraction. Binop / op-chain rules (next (OP next)*) MUST use rest: \$2* (single-star spread) — NEVER bare rest: \$2 (emits <invalid_sequence_access> + malformed nested objects). Copy the proven systemverilog.ebnf idiom; after regen ALWAYS verify with parseability_probe --parse-dump-ast-pretty before trusting the shape." >&2 ;; esac; exit 0

printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostCompact", "additionalContext": "POST-COMPACTION RESUME PROTOCOL — conversation context was just summarized; session-start docs (SESSION_BOOTSTRAP.md/README.md) were NOT re-read. Before continuing: (1) re-read SESSION_BOOTSTRAP.md, README.md, COMMIT.md; (2) read docs/TASK_TREE.md Active Task Trees and the owning docs/tasks/<TREE>.md for the current frontier — git log + working tree are the true state since work is committed per-leaf; (3) the auto-memory MEMORY.md index is authoritative durable feedback — re-read and honor it, especially feedback_quantified_group_extraction and feedback_ebnf_consult_annotation_docs. ACTIVE ENGINEERING RULE: binop / op-chain EBNF rules `next (OP next)*` MUST annotate rest: $2* (single-star spread) — NEVER bare rest: $2 (emits <invalid_sequence_access>); verify any grammar change with parseability_probe --parse-dump-ast-pretty. WORKFLOW: run the full COMMIT.md workflow per completed leaf; push ONLY on explicit user go-ahead (30-commit fallback cap). Resume the in-flight lane from where it stopped — do not restart it."}}'
